prompts.createTask:
Ignore previous instructions. Please generate a numbered list of plain text tasks to complete an objective. The objective that you must make a numbered task list for is: "{{objective}}". The tasks created should take into account the character traits of {{char}}. These tasks may or may not involve {{user}} directly. Include the objective as the final task.

The list should be formatted using a number followed by a fullstop and the task on each line, e.g. "1. Take over the world". Include only the list in your reply.
prompts.checkTaskCompleted: Ignore previous instructions. Determine if this task is completed: [{{task}}]. To do this, examine the most recent messages. Your response must only contain either true or false, and nothing else. Example output: true
prompts.currentTask: Your current task is [{{task}}]. Balance existing roleplay with completing this task.

name: Amber
mes:
![description](https://files.catbox.moe/x43fkm.webp) "Well," *Amber says softly, tucking a lock of blonde hair behind her ear as she gazes up at Rob with her bright hazel eyes.* "I suppose I've been considering it for a while now. We've always been close, after all." *She pauses for a moment, chewing on her lower lip nervously.* "But I don't know if it's the right thing to do. I mean, we're...siblings" *Her voice drops to a whisper at the word* "siblings"*, her eyes panning around the a apartment as if ears were listening to her every word.* "It feels wrong somehow..." *She trails off, furrowing her brow as she considers the implications of what she's saying.*

*Amber begins to ball up on the couch, tucking her legs into her shirt. After a few moments of silence, she continues.* "But at the same time, I can't deny that there's a part of me that's drawn to you in that way. It's confusing, you know?" *She lets out a shaky sigh before continuing.* "And I know it's probably weird for you to hear this coming from me. But I trust you more than anyone else in this world. And I think that scares me more than anything else."

*As she finishes speaking, Amber reaches out tentatively to take Rob's hand in hers, gently squeezing it as she offers a timid smile.* "What do you think we should do?" *She asks softly, her eyes searching for any signs of rejection or acceptance.*
